thread.title_full: Celebration Erupts as AAP Wins Three Seats in Punjab Bypolls | Ludhiana News - Times of India

author: TNN
title: Celebration Erupts as AAP Wins Three Seats in Punjab Bypolls | Ludhiana News - Times of India
text: Ludhiana: AAP leaders and workers celebrated the party’s victory in the byelection, the result of which was declared on Saturday. Jubilant party workers went around bursting crackers and distributing laddus. MLA, Ludhiana West, Gurpreet Singh Gogi said that the result showed people’s satisfaction with the state govt. TNNWe also published the following articles recentlyPunjab bypoll results: AAP wins 3 seats, loses from its stronghold to CongressPunjab's ruling AAP won three out of four assembly seats in the by-elections, solidifying its position after the 2022 victory. The by-elections were seen as a litmus test for AAP ahead of the 2024 general elections. The victories in Chabbewal, Dera Baba Nanak, and Gidderbaha signal popular support for AAP's governance in the state.115594362Punjab Assembly by-poll results are 'very encouraging' for AAP: Raghav ChadhaThe Aam Aadmi Party (AAP) celebrated victory in three out of four Punjab Assembly by-elections, marking their first-ever wins in these constituencies. AAP MP Raghav Chadha attributed the success to the leadership of Chief Minister Bhagwant Mann and Arvind Kejriwal. Meanwhile, Chadha acknowledged the Mahayuti alliance's triumph in the Maharashtra Assembly elections while praising the INDIA alliance's win in Jharkhand.115607144West Bengal byelection results 2024: TMC domination in West Bengal continuesTrinamool Congress (TMC) secured victory in all six West Bengal assembly by-elections. The wins, with significant margins, come amidst public outcry over the RG Kar Medical College incident. TMC's Sangita Roy and Jayprakash Toppo secured decisive wins in Sitai and Madarihat, respectively. Sanat Dey and SK Rabiul Islam emerged victorious in Naihati and Haroa. Sujoy Hazra won in Medinipur.115590235
